body.title: Master ebook index across all 4 folder trees: Calibre, Kindle, SORTUS-EBOOKS, TheIgorsProject/Readings
body.result: tools/build_ebook_index.py: scans Calibre Library (3702 via metadata.db), Kindle (129), SORTUS-EBOOKS (57), TheIgorsProject/Readings (72). Cross-refs reading_list. Output: ~/.TheIgors/local/ebooks/master_index.json (1.8MB) + summary.txt. Results: 3960 total, 121 completed, 3837 untracked. Top formats: epub/zip/azw/txt/mobi.
